review_title: Spreadsheet Simplicity That Syncs With Shopify and WMS In Seconds!
description: I am able to instantly push product data and to Shopify and our WMS has saved me hours in time and also virtually eliminates inconsistancies in the data between systems. I am able to create Brand Portals in seconds which can be shared with the wider business without compromising on protected data - they only see what I want them to see.
author: Allie S.
pros: Plytix has a familiar, spreadsheet-like interface and being able to instantly push product data and to Shopify and our WMS has saved me hours in time and also virtually eliminates inconsistancies in the data between systems. We have had terrific customer support from the team who have been ready and able to help us whenever needed. I use this tool every day and it's been so easy from the get-go. When we implemented, I was only the data custodian, however as the team has changed I've also been looking after the techical side which has been very easy to learn and integrate with our existing systems.
cons: There are not enough checks and balances for my liking. I'd like to be able to make some fields mandetory for upload.

review_title: Flexible platform and easy to use
description: When we started our digital transformation journey, we didn't even know what a PIM was! Now Plytix is the 'point of truth' for our website, ERP and CRM systems. Plytix was a great solution to help us manage our products and ultimately provide the knowledge and information that our customers have requested from us.
author: Hillary D.
pros: The layout and ease of use - everything just makes sense. I find this platform to be very intuitive, and whenever I was stumped, I would check the Help Center for guidance.
cons: Implementing a new system forced us to really look at the integrity of our data - it was a challenge to gather and sort and check our product information. The one area that I wish had a bit more depth was the structure - we have products that come in different sizes, materials and colours and had to choose which was the dominant field when establishing the relationships between products. But it's not a big deal - the Plytix team was able to advise how best to make that happen.

review_title: Plytix isn't the best but enough to start with
author: Marco V.
pros: easy to use features. We started using it in a short time and all our colleagues understood clearly how to use it.
cons: No administration levels. It's too easy for anybody which has access to the system to delete also accidentally important data in each record.

description: Overall very good PIM & DAM. We were with Akeneo and when we migrate to Plytix, everything was much easier.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like the image resizer/transform feature in the Plytix Shopify Channel. It lets me store a huge image in Plytix, but send a smaller version of that same image through Shopify.
cons: I find the product view and list a bit confusing. I hope it will be better in the next update, since there is a lot of update in Plytix.

review_title: Practical, user friendly PIM that improves product data management at scale
description: Overall, Plytix has been a reliable and practical tool that has significantly improved how we manage product data. It has helped centralise information across multiple systems, reduce errors, and improve efficiency in maintaining large catalogues. While there are some limitations for more complex use cases, it performs very well for everyday PIM and DAM needs and continues to improve over time.
author: Maz M.
pros: The simplicity and usability stand out most. It makes managing complex product data much more accessible, especially for teams working across multiple brands or large catalogues. The combination of PIM and DAM in one platform is very effective, and the ability to create structured feeds for different sales channels saves a lot of manual work.
cons: There are some limitations around advanced automation and complex product relationships, particularly when dealing with large variant structures. Some workflows still require manual workarounds, and more advanced reporting or filtering would improve the platform further.

review_title: Great, fast and most flexible PIM system there is.
description: Plytix is a great system, very easy to use and incredibly helpful in our daily operations. We’re very happy with it and honestly, we can’t imagine running our business without it anymore.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Plytix has significantly improved our workflow thanks to its flexibility and speed of development. It's extremely user-friendly, making it easy to find and manage our data. One major advantage is the cost—it’s more affordable than its main competitors, offering great value. Uploading and managing assets like product images is seamless. We can easily link files without having to upload them multiple times, which saves us a lot of time and effort. Each team can define their own completeness criteria for filling in product data, which is incredibly helpful. It ensures that everyone focuses on what matters most to their responsibilities, while still maintaining consistency across the board. Most importantly, Plytix has become our single source of truth for product information—something we never had in the past. This centralized, reliable access to data has made a real difference in how we operate.
cons: That said, we see room for improvement. A direct integration with Microsoft Business Central would be highly valuable, enabling us to sync data between our PIM and ERP systems more efficiently. Also, while the platform’s flexibility is a big plus, it can introduce complexity. We've found it essential to have an internal expert who manages the structure and fields to ensure consistency and maintainability.

review_title: Great Value and Easy Collaboration for Managing Product Data
description: I would highly recommend Plytix to anyone needing to store images and data. It has an easy learning curve, even for teams that aren't tech-savvy, and offers great value compared to other platforms on the market.
author: John W.
pros: What I liked most was how easy Plytix is to navigate and use. This simplicity is a huge plus for our team's collaboration and helps us manage our data much more effectively.
cons: The biggest challenge for us involves image uploads. We handle a high volume of images, and they all need uniform filenames. Our contact at Plytix, [sensitive content hidden], has a great workaround for renaming set up for our company, but I hope to see a more automated solution for this in the future. Over all no real Cons about Plytix.

review_title: Easy to use PIM thats going places!
description: I like the usability of the product, along with the ease of configuration for the user without long training required. I have to call out the support and the very good responsiveness from the Plytix team. The solution is evolving all the team with improvements and new features.
author: Jat D.
pros: Having worked with numerous PIM and DAM solutions, I appreciate the User Interface of the platform as well as the ease of usability and configuration of the platform.
cons: Some features are still in the roadmap which I have seen in other solutions, however, the Plytix team are very proactive in adding features to the roadmap and taking on board customer feedback.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best migration decision we've made — and it keeps paying off
description: Migrating to Plytix is one of the highest-leverage decisions we've made on our tech stack. We manage a portfolio of brands and needed a PIM that could scale with us without becoming the bottleneck — Plytix has delivered on both fronts. The product is strong, the team behind it genuinely innovates, and it's the kind of partner you want when you're building for the long term rather than just solving today's problem. Highly recommend for any multi-brand operation evaluating a migration.
author: Sarah M.
pros: The combination of flexibility and pace of innovation. We run multiple e-commerce brands and Plytix handles very different catalogs, data models, and brand requirements without making us hack around the tool. On top of that, the team actually ships — meaningful improvements land consistently, not just cosmetic updates. Most platforms in this category plateau after the sales cycle ends. Plytix keeps getting better, and we keep finding new ways to use it.
cons: The platform is deep enough that you don't unlock its full value on day one. There's a real learning curve if you want to use it to its potential, and we've had to be intentional about carving out time to explore features we didn't initially know existed. Not a dealbreaker — honestly it's a good problem to have — but worth knowing going in so you can plan onboarding accordingly.
author_profession: Senior Director, Digital Product and Experience

description: Overall, my experience with Plytix has been good. The platform is easy to use and helps centralize and manage product data effectively. It has improved workflow efficiency, although some features could be more flexible for complex requirements.
author: Tayna N.
pros: I liked how user-friendly and intuitive Plytix is. It makes managing product information much easier and more organized, especially when working with large catalogs.
cons: What I liked least about Plytix is that some features feel a bit limited when dealing with more complex workflows, and it can take time to adapt certain processes to fit specific business needs.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great experience so far, confident going forward that Plytix are the right solution for our PIM system.
author: Alex H.
pros: Great service from implementation and account management, solid data management solution. Flexible and new features regularly added. Large bank of information available online.
cons: I'd personally make brand portals slightly more customisable from a branding perspective.

description: We have a lot of products, an exceptionally large number for our small store. Many of the products have lots of variants. When we first tried to open our Shopify store, getting all those products live, complete, and updated, was impossible. Plytix has made product management systematic.
author: Robert F.
pros: I tried a few PIMs before we settled on Plytix. Plytix Just Works. Integration with Shopify, our most important platform, is complete and bug-free. Also, support is fast, and the support folks really know their stuff.
cons: I haven't learned how to use Plytix Asset manager. We use it, but I'm sure we could use it better.

review_title: It's the best value PIM software available online!
description: Keeping our database in sync and online.
author: Isaiah L.
pros: The value of their product and services is absolutely the best! Plytix is the first PIM database we have purchased but before, we tried all the top PIM solutions in the market and we could not meet their prices. The Plytix gave us the best offer for implementing the PIM system. Once we went through the onboard process which was a breeze thanks to their support group, there was some learning curve of about one week to get things rolling. Once understanding the way Plytix operates, it was very easy to use. We took about two weeks of tweaking the data columns as how we wanted it and from then on, it's been well used. We work with close to 2,000 skus. We have uploaded all the data we can imagine onto Plytix. And exporting the data was very easy too but it would require some setting up and tweaking involved. We are using plytix to upload our product database, images, files, and custom prices for customers that established a unique pricing structure. Plytix also has catalog feature which can export certain products or all the products as a pdf. This can be used for catalog or individual tech sheets. It is still in need of updating some of this feature. They are constantly working on improving the programs and features which is why we will stay with them long term. We are most satisfied with their products and services.
cons: Cons about the Plytix is when creating an export job, we had to add each data column one by one instead of "add all data columns". The exporting requires choosing which data columns to export. The PDF catalog feature is limited as we cannot choose the size of the product image. Cannot generate a PDF price list with small thumbnail image of the product because it will usually show one item per one page. Once an attribute is created, it cannot change type. If an attribute is number type, you cannot change to text type after it's been created. You will have to find alternate way. By duplicating, recreating attribute with new type, and then deleting old attribute. There is no "undo last import". It would be great feature to have. When browsing all products, the thumbnail view of images are too small. When selecting what items to put in the catalog, you can select the entire page but the page is limited to 100 items. So there are 2,000 sku, you have to flip through 200 pages and make selections per page instead of selecting by filter, or have select all and then unchecking items not to show.

review_title: All your Product Data in one Location
author: Daniel W.
pros: Plytix has been a great system to allow us to consolidate all of our product data. We run mulitple websites and supply feeds for numerous resellers. We constantly found updating information painful with everything disconnected. Plytix fixed this with all data now stored within and feeding out to our various systems.
cons: The api could be a little easier to use. Have struggled to get image urls to export with bulk product data.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It is vital to keep our product data accurate and in the correct format, its incredibly easy to export various data to send to our Sales team which makes it a great multi tool.
author: Elly C.
pros: The Team at Plytix are amazing the functionality of Plytix is easy to maneuver however there team are always available for training and help which is there best asset.
cons: The layout of the page could be improved

description: We are using Plytix Index as the base to relaunch our new e-commerce websites and allow us to integrate with more than one marketplace in the future - We have come to realise after 12 years of selling online our data was poor and needed to be organised to build for the future.
author: David B.
pros: The one thing about Plytix Index I like is the Ease of use of the software - unlike alot of other PIM's I dont have to be a programmer to get it to work, Its quick and efficient and will form the base of our continuing development for our e-commerce business. The support guys are amazing and will do almost anything to help.
cons: Unfortunatley I have personally tried to run before I can walk, I want the features of a $30000 p/year PIM for Almost free and the cost per SKU can work out expensive if you have a lot of products like us - The developers are continuing to work on new features which in time will make Pytix Index something to be rivaled.

author: Anne L.
pros: It is easy to use and learn. The Bulk fuction is perfect.
cons: I can not bulk photos on products with lots of sizes.

author: Juan V.
pros: Everything is simple and clear to navigate through. I can easily search for a product, download all images, and other documents with a simple click, and never have to worry about not finding what I'm looking for.
cons: The font is kind of boring to look at but all else is superb.

description: We were looking for one system to put all our data in and connect this system to all our channels, and Plytix provides the necessarty tools to fulfill our needs.
author: Cecile V.
pros: Very userfriendly software with unlimited bulk import options which saves a lot of time and is very efficient. The customer service very patient and helpful and is alway available.
cons: So far, the system doesn't have any restictions. The uploading of all the images and renaming the images and re-importing the images seems a little circuitous.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Quality and very passionate team
description: It is a must for online retail business and Plytix is one of the best solution for this area. I searched almost for 1 year to find to best solution and an affordable product. Plytix helps my company to save time more than I expected
author: Semih K.
pros: Easy to use and understand User-friendly Importing and exporting a lot of information is very very easy. Have a great team when you need support Price is the best for its service
cons: Need more specific improvement for attributes area

review_title: Easy to use, extremely intuitive. Overall useful.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Infos are easy to find, add, edit and organize. I find it very easy to implement to my team and I like how fast it is.
cons: Can't tag my colleagues in tasks, as to allocating traslations or infos added. It is a pity because it is a collaborative tool
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Salman Khaled O.
pros: This is quite organized. You can filter any attribute very easily. You can bulk-update products quite easily. You can create views and save them for later use.
cons: You can't assign rights for different roles in attribute label. but I guess it's on development.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very good experience with customer support in case of questions or feedback
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: 1 easibility of the software 2: Speed and overview of most channel availability
cons: Compatibility and limitations on design product brochures

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to use Fantastic customer support Makes our lives easier
cons: That we didn't hear about and implement it sooner!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Luis C.
pros: easy connection with Shopify just with some ciic
cons: the software is very good not have any problem
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
